notes: Targeted end-to-end CLI timings collected after the trigram implementation landed.
A fresh temp index was created first, then subsequent commands reused the same temp index.
This is intentionally a smoke check, not a full comparison run, because the implementation already showed severe latency regression.

commands.name: warm_find_message_notify_url
commands.command: bun run src/index.ts --json --source-root ~/.codex --index-db /tmp/ath-post-impl.sqlite find notify_url --kind message --limit 20

conclusion.summary: The current trigram prototype regresses end-to-end CLI latency by a large margin and should not be considered performance-positive in its current form.
